title: Two clocks, one month
subtitle: DORA's lead time and the issue-to-shipped measure across the same engineering team. Same loop, different starting points.
caption: BIOS engineering team, April 6 – May 4, 2026. Lead time mean across 30 agent PRs. Issue→shipped median across 78 feedback-sourced issues.
